description_long: This rifle features a long, angular barrel with a predominantly metallic silver and black finish, accented by teal highlights on the receiver and grip area. The body is constructed with a combination of robust metal components and polymer elements, giving it a modern, tactical appearance. The stock is minimalistic and integrated into the main frame, suggesting a fixed or skeletonized design. The upper receiver includes a rail system, likely for mounting optics or accessories, and the handguard is streamlined for ergonomic handling. The magazine is not externally visible, indicating it may be internal or not present in this depiction. The muzzle is simple and unadorned, with no visible suppressor or brake attached.
description: A sleek, modern rifle with a long silver barrel, black and teal accents, and a minimalistic stock. The design is angular and tactical, with a streamlined handguard and integrated rail system.
description_view_0: The rifle is shown from a three-quarter perspective, highlighting the long barrel, angular receiver, and teal-accented grip area.
description_view_1: This rearward view emphasizes the slim profile of the barrel and the compact, minimalistic stock.
description_view_2: A full side profile reveals the length of the barrel, the integrated rail system, and the streamlined handguard.
description_view_3: The top-down angle showcases the flat upper receiver, rail system, and the overall narrowness of the rifle.
